visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a white long-sleeved top and a black high-waisted skirt, stands in a brightly lit warehouse store. She leans over a shopping cart containing packages of bread, looking at them with a focused expression while shoppers move in the background. (2) The woman picks up a transparent plastic container holding three large, golden-brown breads topped with shredded meat floss and melted cheese. A vibrant yellow graphic overlay appears, framing her as she presents the container to the camera. (3) The camera focuses on the bread as the woman holds it up. She places her palm near the bread to demonstrate its large size, nearly matching the length of her hand, while maintaining a smiling facial expression. (4) The scene shifts to an indoor home setting where the same woman, now in a maroon top, sits at a table with another woman wearing a yellow striped shirt and a red bucket hat. They hold broken pieces of the bread, showing the interior texture to the camera. (5) An extreme close-up captures a knife slicing through one of the breads on a wooden board, revealing a dense filling of meat floss and a swirl of yellow cheese within the soft white crumb. (6) The two women are shown eating the bread and talking excitedly at the table. The woman in the red hat gestures with her hands while the original packaging and bread crumbs are visible on the table surface.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. (2) [Subtitle]: 又在看麵包. [Variety]: 肉鬆加起司. (3) [Variety]: 罪惡組合 肉鬆起司麵包 3入299. (4) [Subtitle]: 所以一個100塊. (5) [Subtitle]: 然後一個手掌那麼大. (6) [Subtitle]: 回去吃看看 值不值得. (7) [Subtitle]: 我們吃起來心得是好吃 烤過好吃 不烤也很好吃 然後上面的起司皮是有香味的哦. (8) [Variety]: 鹹鹹香香. (9) [Variety]: !太大人份了!. (10) [Subtitle]: 但不得不說 上面起司皮有夠香的.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main female creators, 1 male shopper in background, 2 other female shoppers partially visible
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: The first woman has long dark hair, initially wearing a white top and black skirt, then a maroon top. The second woman wears a yellow striped shirt and a red bucket hat.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The first scene is a large warehouse retail environment with high ceilings, refrigerated units, and industrial shelving. The second scene is a cozy indoor dining or living area with a table, cutting board, and household items in the background.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio track opens with a high-energy male narrator speaking in Mandarin Chinese, his voice characterized by a mid-range pitch and enthusiastic prosody. A high-tempo electronic pop beat plays continuously in the background. Faint rumbles from a retail environment are audible under the vocals. (2) A synthetic 'pop' sound effect triggers a new phase as the speaker emphasizes the price of the bread. The background music remains upbeat with a strong 4/4 electronic drum rhythm. (3) A female voice enters, speaking with a higher pitch and increased arousal level as she reacts to the product size. A sharp 'ding' sound effect punctuates her comparison. (4) The acoustic environment shifts to a cleaner room tone. The distinct, crisp sound of crusty bread being sliced creates a transient peak in the spectrum. The male and female voices overlap as they begin the review. (5) Laughter and high-pitched vocal inflections dominate as the two women discuss the flavor. The background music maintains its energy, providing a consistent rhythmic floor beneath the lively conversation. (6) A stylized 'whoosh' sound effect concludes the final vocal sentence, as the voices and music maintain a high arousal level until the track quickly fades to silence.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Product Introduction -> Demonstration -> Taste Test -> Review/Verdict.
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To provide an enthusiastic and informative review of a specific Costco bakery item (Meat Floss and Cheese Bread), highlighting its value, size, and flavor profile to potential shoppers.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video focuses entirely on showcasing and reviewing a specific branded retail product in a positive manner.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video utilizes fast-paced editing and social-media style graphic overlays to maintain viewer engagement during a casual consumer review.
